category_title: Students who exhibit physical distress and avoidance behaviors (crying, falling to floor) in loud environments
scenario_title: Walking transition with crying and stereotypic behaviors
minimal_context: The student is walking with the teacher and an aid through the gross motor room.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the ball in the gross motor area.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Bounces on the ball, makes high pitch noises and flaps hands.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, it is time to walk with me and the aid. Give me your hand.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Holds the teacher's hand and starts to walk.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the ball in the gross motor area.

STUDENT: (Bounces on the ball, makes high pitch noises and flaps hands.)

TUTOR: Okay, it is time to walk with me and the aid. Give me your hand.

STUDENT: (Holds the teacher's hand and starts to walk.)

TUTOR: Keep walking with us.

STUDENT: (Walks with the teacher, occasionally crying.)

task.content: Walking with the teacher (D) and an aid

context.environment: Walking path/area in the gross motor room
context.social_setting: Walking with teacher (D) and an aid

behavior_patterns.condition: When using a ball in the gross motor area
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Bounces on the ball, makes high pitch noises and flaps hands
